description: Style Note Super soft vintage leather and a variety of hues to choose from, wallets from fossil are the way to go for a look that chic and versatile effortlessly. Spice up your outfit with these funky yet conventional wallets and get ready to be on top of your game! Product Details Multi coloured wallet that has a zipped closure with a key and bead detail on the zip, inner zipped pocket with branding and six card holders, one insert pocket and six card holders on the right, two insert pockets, four card holders and one id card holder on the left, stitch detailing and brand name appliqued on the front of the wallet Material and Care Vintage leather Wipe with clean, damp cloth to remove dirt Dimensions:9.5 cm x 19 cm
